Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group ( (HK:1929) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group Limited has announced its audited results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, along with unaudited key operational data for the period from April 1 to May 31, 2025. This announcement meets the requirements of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange for preliminary annual results disclosure, indicating the company’s compliance with listing regulations.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1929) stock is a Buy with a HK$9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group stock, see the HK:1929 Stock Forecast page.

More about Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group

Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily operating in the jewellery industry. It is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and focuses on the production and sale of jewellery products.

WAY 2 VAT LTD ( (AU:W2V) ) just unveiled an announcement.

WAY 2 VAT LTD announced a significant change in the interests of its substantial holder, Richard Kemle Colebatch, who increased his voting power from 5.50% to 6.67% through an allotment of ordinary shares. This increase in voting power reflects a strategic move that could potentially influence the company’s decision-making and future direction, impacting stakeholders and possibly enhancing the company’s market position.

More about WAY 2 VAT LTD

WAY 2 VAT LTD operates in the financial technology industry, focusing on providing VAT recovery and management solutions. The company is known for its innovative approach to automating VAT processes, catering primarily to businesses looking to streamline their tax recovery operations.

data.title: Accent Group Faces Challenging Market Conditions in FY25
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Accent Group Ltd ( (AU:AX1) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Accent Group Limited has reported challenging trading conditions in the second half of the fiscal year 2025, with low growth in the lifestyle footwear market affecting both retail and wholesale sales. The company is experiencing pressure on gross margins due to a competitive promotional environment and a focus on managing inventory levels. Like-for-like sales have decreased by 1.0% over 23 weeks, and gross margins have fallen by 80 basis points compared to the previous year. Despite these challenges, the company expects its full-year EBIT to be between $108.0 million and $111.0 million.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:AX1) stock is a Buy with a A$2.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Accent Group Ltd stock, see the AU:AX1 Stock Forecast page.

More about Accent Group Ltd

Accent Group Limited operates in the lifestyle footwear industry, focusing on both retail and wholesale segments. The company is known for managing a variety of footwear brands and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX:AX1).

Average Trading Volume: 1,280,850

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$1.11B
